action.reasoning: Observation: Current best is a 90/10 GRU/LSTM weighted ensemble at hidden AUC 0.768013, only marginally above the 7-seed GRU ensemble; LSTM alone is weaker. Analysis: Same-architecture neural ensembling is saturated, so a complementary non-neural sequential feature model may add independent ranking signal. A PFA-style logistic model using prior per-student/per-skill attempts, wins, failures, and global skill priors is fast to train and causal at prediction time. Decision: implement a PFA logistic trainer/evaluator and extend predict.py/checkpoint loading to optionally blend PFA probabilities with neural ensemble; first train on train and evaluate val to estimate useful blend weights before using train+val.
